sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 브로드컴은 AI 반도체 수요 강세에 힘입어 1분기 매출 193억 1,100만 달러를 기록하며 사상 최대 실적을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 1분기 매출은 전년 동기 대비 29% 증가한 193억 1,100만 달러를 기록하며 사상 최대치를 경신했습니다.
AI 반도체 부문의 강력한 수요가 성장을 견인했으며, 1분기 AI 매출은 전년 대비 106% 성장한 84억 달러를 기록했습니다.
주주 환원 정책의 일환으로 1분기 중 109억 달러를 배당 및 자사주 매입으로 환원했으며, 신규 100억 달러 규모의 자사주 매입 프로그램을 발표했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 맞춤형 AI 가속기 및 AI 네트워킹 솔루션에 대한 견고한 수요가 지속되고 있습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 조정 EBITDA는 전년 대비 30% 증가한 131억 2,800만 달러로 매출의 68% 수준을 달성했습니다.

watchItems.text: 2분기 AI 반도체 매출 가이던스로 제시된 107억 달러 달성 여부와 전사 매출 성장률 47% 달성 가능성을 확인해야 합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 avgo-02012026x8kxex99.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Broadcom Inc. Announces First Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results and Quarterly Dividend • Revenue of $19,311 million for the first quarter, up 29 percent from the prior year period • GAAP net income of $7,349 million for the first quarter; Non-GAAP net income of $10,185 million for the first quarter • Adjusted EBITDA of $13,128 million for the first quarter, or 68 percent of revenue • GAAP diluted EPS of $1.50 for the first quarter; Non-GAAP diluted EPS of $2.  Normalized numeric aliases: $19,311 million = 193억 1,100만 달러; $7,349 million = 73억 4,900만 달러; $10,185 million = 101억 8,500만 달러; $13,128 million = 131억 2,800만 달러; $8,260 million = 82억 6,000만 달러; $250 million = 2억 5,000만 달러; $8,010 million = 80억 1,000만 달러; $22.0 billion = 220억 달러; $1.50 = 1.50달러; $0.65 = 0.65달러; 13,128 million = 131억 2,800만 달러; 41 percent = 41%; 8,260 million = 82억 6,000만 달러; 8,010 million = 80억 1,000만 달러; 29 percent = 29%; 68 percent = 68%.

nt from the prior year period • Second quarter fiscal year 2026 Adjusted EBITDA guidance of approximately 68 percent of projected revenue (1) • New $10 billion share repurchase program PALO ALTO, Calif. – March 4, 2026 – Broadcom Inc. (Nasdaq: AVGO), a global technology leader that designs, develops and supplies semiconductor and infrastructure software solutions, today reported financial results for its first quarter of fiscal year 2026, ended February 1, 2026, provided guidance for its second quarter of fiscal year 2026 and announced its quarterly dividend. “Broadcom achieved record first quarter revenue on continued strength in AI semiconductor solutions. Q1 AI revenue of $8.4 billion grew 106% year-over-year, above our forecast, driven by robust demand for custom AI accelerators and AI networking,” said Hock Tan, President and CEO of Broadcom Inc. “Our AI revenue g  Normalized numeric aliases: $10 billion = 100억 달러; $8.4 billion = 84억 달러; $10 = 10달러; $8.4 = 8.4달러; 68 percent = 68%.

ng, and we expect AI semiconductor revenue to be $10.7 billion in Q2.” “Consolidated revenue grew 29% year-over-year to a record $19.3 billion. Adjusted EBITDA increased 30% year-over-year to a record $13.1 billion, representing 68% of revenue. In Q2 we expect revenue growth to increase 47% year-over-year to $22.0 billion, with adjusted EBITDA of 68%,” said Kirsten Spears, CFO of Broadcom Inc. “Consistent with our commitment to return excess cash to shareholders, we returned $10.9 billion in the first quarter through $3.1 billion of cash dividends and $7.8 billion of stock repurchases.” ________________________________ (1) The Company is not readily able to provide a reconciliation o  Normalized numeric aliases: $10.7 billion = 107억 달러; $19.3 billion = 193억 달러; $13.1 billion = 131억 달러; $22.0 billion = 220억 달러; $10.9 billion = 109억 달러; $3.1 billion = 31억 달러; $7.8 billion = 78억 달러; $10.7 = 10.7달러; $13.1 = 13.1달러; $19.3 = 19.3달러; $22.0 = 22.0달러; $10.9 = 10.9달러; $3.1 = 3.1달러; $7.8 = 7.8달러.
